productDisplayName: Wrangler Women Western Yoke Black Shirt
description: CompositionBlack and grey checked shirt made of 100% cotton, has a slim spread collar, a full front buttoned placket, long sleeves with buttoned cuffs, buttoned epaulettes on shoulders, Western style yoked back and front, seam lines for Fit on front and back, mock welt pockets on chest and a curved hemFitRegularWash careMachine wash with like colours using a mild detergentWash and dry inside outDo not bleach or wringFlat dry in shade or tumble dryWarm iron;Do not iron on decorationswrangler has been clothing the world since 1947 and they're showing no sign of slowing down – this stylish polo t-shirt with its short gathered sleeves enhances your feminine side, while the fabric keeps you fresh and comfortable all day. Team this with slim fit jeans and sneakers or cotton shorts and sandals.Model statisticsThe product is a size M on a model of height 5'8” and chest 33”
